column1: How positive or negative did this trial feel?

column3: How in control did you feel during this trial?
column4: What was your primary emotion during this trial?
column5: If the robot failed, which of the below corrections do you think would have helped your communication? (Pick Top 3)
column6: If the robot failed, which non-verbal behaviors would have improved your communication.

column5: It should either say 'i dont understand' or give its best guess. Something in the middle is even more frustrating.
column6: Lights pulsing or flashing briefly to show that the robot detected an error, A visual reset animation such as dimming and re-brightening drawer lights, Smaller the screen the better - should be haptic / physical buttons. Someone could get good at remembering where buttons are instead of navigating menus in dire situations.
